channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Current oil price as of July 22, 2026
item.description: Changes in oil prices affect energy costs and the price of everyday items. Here is why.

item.title: Samsung’s North America CEO says smartphone is just entry point to ambient AI in the home
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: AI world stunned by OpenAI model that secretly escaped secure environment and hacked rival company
item.description: Everything you need to know before reaching the office this morning.

item.title: George Soros never signed the Giving Pledge. He has given away more of his fortune than the billionaires who did
item.description: The 95-year-old investor has donated an estimated 76% of his wealth without ever making the pledge.
